sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 field extraction, implicit significand construction, and operand class detection for zero, infinity, NaN, and subnormal values.
sub_modules.fp_mult_special: Combinational special-case resolver that applies NaN, infinity, zero, and invalid 0-times-infinity priority rules while forwarding the result sign.
sub_modules.fp_mult_mul_exp: Combinational 24x24 significand multiplier and biased exponent pre-calculation using effective exponent 1 for subnormal operands.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize_round: Combinational normalization and round-to-nearest-even unit producing rounded fraction and adjusted exponent.
sub_modules.fp_mult_status: Combinational overflow and underflow detector for the rounded normal datapath while suppressing checks for earlier special cases.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Combinational final IEEE-754 result packer with priority handling for canonical NaN, infinity, signed zero, overflow, normal result, and flushed underflow.
